title: Feature request: Pass to optimize $DFF_xy with constant R input to $DFF_x

features.name: dff with constant async reset
features.description: Code should include an always block with async reset signal driven by a constant expression (1'h1 or 1'h0)
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk or negedge 1'h1) if (!1'h1) reg1 <= 0; else reg1 <= data;

features.name: shreg with constant reset condition
features.description: Code should include a shift register (shreg) assignment inside an always block with constant reset condition that is always true
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk or negedge 1'h1) if (!1'h1) \shreg.shreg[0] <= 0; else \shreg.shreg[0] <= data;
